snippet.description:
Camdaki KńĪz 3. B√∂l√ľm 

22 Nisan PerŇüembe

Sedat‚ÄôńĪn √∂zel dairesinde g√∂rd√ľklerine bir anlam veremeyen Nalan, yaŇüadńĪklarńĪnńĪ kimseyle paylaŇüamaz. Bir Ňüeylerin ters gittińüini hisseden Feride √ßńĪldńĪrńĪr ve Nalan‚ÄôńĪn √ľzerindeki baskńĪyńĪ artńĪrńĪr. Nalan‚ÄôńĪn, gizli dairesini birine anlatacańüńĪ konusunda endiŇüelenen Sedat, Cana‚Äôyla buluŇüur. Cana, Nalan‚Äôla konuŇüup durumu d√ľzeltmesini tembihler. Ancak bu buluŇümada bir magazincinin √ßektińüi fotońüraflar, Sedat‚Äôa pahalńĪya mal olacaktńĪr.

Sedat, Nalan‚Äôla konuŇüup, √∂zel dairede g√∂rd√ľklerinin kendisine ait olmadńĪńüńĪnńĪ anlatńĪr. Nalan, Sedat‚Äôa yeniden g√ľven duyar, sevdińüi adamla evleneceńüi i√ßin mutludur. YaklaŇüan felaketten habersiz olan Sedat, bu sorunu da √ß√∂zd√ľńü√ľ i√ßin rahatlar.

Ancak hi√ßbir sńĪr sonsuza kadar gizli kalmaz. Fotońüraflar, Korońülu malikanesinde bomba etkisi yaratńĪr. Selen, Nalan ve ailesi g√∂rmeden, fotońüraflarńĪn basńĪlmasńĪnńĪ engellemeyi baŇüarabilecek midir?

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. snippet.title: ¬ę–Ě—É-–ļ–į, –≤—Ā–Ķ –≤–ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ķ!¬Ľ. –ó–≤–Ķ–∑–ī–Ĺ—č–Ļ –≥–ĺ—Ā—ā—Ć - –õ–į—Ä–ł—Ā–į –Ē–ĺ–Ľ–ł–Ĺ–į | 1 –í—č–Ņ—É—Ā–ļ 8. –°–Ķ–∑–ĺ–Ĺ 3 | All Together Now
snippet.description:
¬ę–Ě—É-–ļ–į, –≤—Ā–Ķ –≤–ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ķ!¬Ľ ‚Äď —É–Ĺ–ł–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ –∑—Ä–Ķ–Ľ–ł—Č–Ĺ–ĺ—Ā—ā–ł, –ļ—Ä–į—Ā–ĺ—ā–Ķ –ł —ć–ľ–ĺ—Ü–ł–ĺ–Ĺ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–ľ—É –Ĺ–į–Ņ—Ä—Ź–∂–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—é –ľ—É–∑—č–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–Ķ —ą–ĺ—É, –≤ –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–ľ —Ā–≤–ĺ–ł –Ĺ–Ķ–≤–Ķ—Ä–ĺ—Ź—ā–Ĺ—č–Ķ –≤–ĺ–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–Ķ —ā–į–Ľ–į–Ĺ—ā—č –ī–Ķ–ľ–ĺ–Ĺ—Ā—ā—Ä–ł—Ä—É—é—ā –Ľ—É—á—ą–ł–Ķ –ł—Ā–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł, –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī—Ā—ā–į–≤–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł –≤—Ā–Ķ—Ö —Ā—ā–ł–Ľ–Ķ–Ļ –ł –Ĺ–į–Ņ—Ä–į–≤–Ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ļ! –ź –ĺ—Ü–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–≤–į—é—ā –ł—Ö —Ā—Ä–į–∑—É 100 —á–Ķ–Ľ–ĺ–≤–Ķ–ļ –≤–ĺ –≥–Ľ–į–≤–Ķ —Ā –°–Ķ—Ä–≥–Ķ–Ķ–ľ –õ–į–∑–į—Ä–Ķ–≤—č–ľ. 

–Ď–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ–Ķ –ľ–į—Ā—ą—ā–į–Ī–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ł –ĺ–Ī—ä–Ķ–ļ—ā–ł–≤–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –Ĺ–į—Ä–ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –∂—é—Ä–ł –Ķ—Č–Ķ –Ĺ–Ķ –Ī—č–Ľ–ĺ –∑–į –≤—Ā—é –ł—Ā—ā–ĺ—Ä–ł—é —Ä–ĺ—Ā—Ā–ł–Ļ—Ā–ļ–ĺ–≥–ĺ —ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–≤–ł–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—Ź! –í –°–ĺ—ā–Ĺ—é –≤–ĺ—ą–Ľ–ł –Ņ–Ķ–≤—Ü—č, –ļ–ĺ–ľ–Ņ–ĺ–∑–ł—ā–ĺ—Ä—č, –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–ī—é—Ā–Ķ—Ä—č, –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–Ņ–ĺ–ī–į–≤–į—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ł –Ľ—É—á—ą–ł—Ö –≤–ĺ–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č—Ö –≤—É–∑–ĺ–≤ —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ—č, –ľ—É–∑—č–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č–Ķ –Ī–Ľ–ĺ–≥–Ķ—Ä—č –ł –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ā—ā–ĺ –Ľ—é–ī–ł —Ä–į–∑–Ĺ—č—Ö –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ą–Ķ—Ā—Ā–ł–Ļ, –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä—č–Ķ —Ä–į–∑–Ī–ł—Ä–į—é—ā—Ā—Ź –≤ –ľ—É–∑—č–ļ–Ķ –ł —Ā–į–ľ–ł –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ļ—Ä–į—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ—é—ā! 

–í –ļ–į–∂–ī–ĺ–ľ –≤—č–Ņ—É—Ā–ļ–Ķ —ą–ĺ—É —Ā–ĺ—Ä–Ķ–≤–Ĺ—É—é—ā—Ā—Ź 10 —ā–į–Ľ–į–Ĺ—ā–Ľ–ł–≤—č—Ö –ł—Ā–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–Ĺ–ł—ā–Ķ–Ľ–Ķ–Ļ. –ě–Ĺ–ł –Ņ—Ä–ł–Ķ—Ö–į–Ľ–ł —Ā–ĺ –≤—Ā–Ķ—Ö –ļ–ĺ–Ĺ—Ü–ĺ–≤ –†–ĺ—Ā—Ā–ł–ł, –£–ļ—Ä–į–ł–Ĺ—č, –ü—Ä–ł–Ī–į–Ľ—ā–ł–ļ–ł –ł —Ā—ā—Ä–į–Ĺ –°–Ě–ď –ł –≤—č—Ā—ā—É–Ņ–į—é—ā –ļ–į–ļ —Ā–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ, —ā–į–ļ –ł –≤ —Ā–ĺ—Ā—ā–į–≤–Ķ –ľ—É–∑—č–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č—Ö –≥—Ä—É–Ņ–Ņ. –ó–į–ī–į—á–į —É—á–į—Ā—ā–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ĺ–≤ ‚Äď –ł—Ā–Ņ–ĺ–Ľ–Ĺ–ł—ā—Ć –Ľ—é–Ī—É—é –ľ—É–∑—č–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—É—é –ļ–ĺ–ľ–Ņ–ĺ–∑–ł—Ü–ł—é —ā–į–ļ, —á—ā–ĺ–Ī—č —Ā—É–ī—Ć—Ź–ľ –∑–į—Ö–ĺ—ā–Ķ–Ľ–ĺ—Ā—Ć –≤—Ā—ā–į—ā—Ć –ł –Ņ–Ķ—ā—Ć –≤—Ā–Ķ–ľ –≤–ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ķ. –ß–Ķ–ľ –Ī–ĺ–Ľ—Ć—ą–Ķ –≥–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ—Ā–ĺ–≤ –≤ —Ā–≤–ĺ–Ļ —Ö–ĺ—Ä –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—É—á–į–Ķ—ā –ļ–ĺ–Ĺ–ļ—É—Ä—Ā–į–Ĺ—ā, —ā–Ķ–ľ –Ī–ĺ–Ľ—Ć—ą–Ķ –ĺ—á–ļ–ĺ–≤ –ĺ–Ĺ –Ĺ–į–Ī–ł—Ä–į–Ķ—ā. 

–ü—É—ā–Ķ–≤–ļ—É –≤ —Ą–ł–Ĺ–į–Ľ –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—É—á–į—é—ā —ā–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–ļ–ĺ –ī–≤–ĺ–Ķ –Ľ—É—á—ą–ł—Ö —É—á–į—Ā—ā–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ĺ–≤ –ł–∑ –ļ–į–∂–ī–ĺ–≥–ĺ –≤—č–Ņ—É—Ā–ļ–į. –ě–Ī–Ľ–į–ī–į—ā–Ķ–Ľ—Ć 1 –ľ–Ķ—Ā—ā–į –Ņ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ—Ö–ĺ–ī–ł—ā –≤ —Ą–ł–Ĺ–į–Ľ –į–≤—ā–ĺ–ľ–į—ā–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–ł.  –ź –ļ–ĺ–Ĺ–ļ—É—Ä—Ā–į–Ĺ—ā—č, –∑–į–Ĺ—Ź–≤—ą–ł–Ķ 2 –ł 3 –Ņ–ĺ–∑–ł—Ü–ł–ł, –ī–ĺ–Ľ–∂–Ĺ—č –Ī—É–ī—É—ā —Ā—Ä–į–∑–ł—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź –ľ–Ķ–∂–ī—É —Ā–ĺ–Ī–ĺ–Ļ –≤ –ľ—É–∑—č–ļ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –ī—É—ć–Ľ–ł.

snippet.title: Camdaki KńĪz | 2. B√∂l√ľm
snippet.description:
Camdaki KńĪz 2. B√∂l√ľm 

15 Nisan PerŇüembe

T√ľrkiye‚Äônin zengin ve yakńĪŇüńĪklńĪ bekarńĪ Sedat Korońülu‚Äônun Nalan‚Äôla evleneceńüi haberi magazin g√ľndemine bomba gibi d√ľŇüer. Nalan ve ailesi, hafta sonunu ge√ßirmek i√ßin Korońülu‚Äôna ait l√ľks √ßiftlińüe davet edilir. Birbirlerini ilk defa tanńĪyacak olan bu iki aile, karanlńĪk sńĪrlarńĪnńĪ birbirlerinden saklamaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪrken, Nalan bir anda kendisini Rafet Korońülu‚Äônun hazńĪrladńĪńüńĪ bir sńĪnavńĪn i√ßinde bulur.

Nalan ve Sedat, ailelerin de katńĪldńĪńüńĪ sade bir t√∂renle s√∂z y√ľz√ľklerini takarlar. Korońülu ailesini bir t√ľrl√ľ i√ßine sindiremeyen Feride‚Äônin gerginlińüi, hńĪzla girilen evlilik yolunda, iyice artar. Evlenene kadar Nalan‚ÄôńĪ korumak i√ßin, Sedat‚Äôtan uzak tutmaya √ßalńĪŇüan Feride‚Äôye,  ge√ßmiŇüten hi√ß beklenmedik bir ziyaret√ßi gelir‚Ä¶ Adil ve Feride‚Äônin o g√ľne kadar sakladńĪklarńĪ b√ľy√ľk sńĪr, karanlńĪk bir g√∂lge gibi yeniden hayatlarńĪnda belirmiŇütir.  

Nalan ise bir peri masalńĪnda gibidir. Sedat tarafńĪndan, herkesten sakladńĪńüńĪ √∂zel dairesine davet edilen Nalan, Sedat‚Äôla ilgili √∂ńürendikleri karŇüńĪsńĪnda aŇükńĪnńĪn yanńĪnda durabilecek midir? Yoksa bu aŇük masalńĪ daha baŇülamadan bitecek midir?

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandńĪrdńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ľler, Feyyaz Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß,  Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek yer alńĪyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Camdaki KńĪz Trailer is streaming! Adapted from Gulseren Budayicioglu‚Äôs novel of the same name, Camdaki KńĪz is based on a true love story. Kanal D‚Äôs new drama has a phenomenal cast. Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. Written by Seda Altayli Turgutlu, directed by Nadim Guc, Camdaki Kiz is going to premier on 8 April Thursday at 8 pm on Kanal D!

Oyuncular:  Burcu Biricik, Devrim Yakut, Feyyez Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß, Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek bulunuyor

Twitter : https://twitter.com/camdakikizdizi

snippet.description: –ö–ĺ–≥–ī–į —ā–Ķ—Ä—Ź–Ķ—ą—Ć —Ā–≤–ĺ–ł—Ö –Ī–Ľ–ł–∑–ļ–ł—Ö, —ā–ĺ –ļ–į–∂–Ķ—ā—Ā—Ź, —á—ā–ĺ –≤–Ķ—Ā—Ć –ľ–ł—Ä —Ä—É—ą–ł—ā—Ā—Ź –≤–ĺ–ļ—Ä—É–≥ —ā–Ķ–Ī—Ź. –Ę–į–ļ –ł —É –Ĺ–į—ą–Ķ–Ļ –≥–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–ł–Ĺ–ł ‚ÄĒ –í–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ł. –°–ľ–Ķ—Ä—ā—Ć –ľ—É–∂–į –Ĺ–Ķ —ā–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–ļ–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ–ī–ļ–ĺ—Ā–ł–Ľ–į –Ķ—Ď, –Ĺ–ĺ –ł –ĺ—Ā—ā–į–≤–ł–Ľ–į –ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ –Ĺ–į –ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ —Ā–ĺ –≤—Ā–Ķ–ľ–ł –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–Ī–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–į–ľ–ł, –≥–Ľ–į–≤–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –ł–∑ –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä—č—Ö-–Ī–į–Ĺ–ī–ł—ā—č. –ě—ā–Ķ—Ü –í–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ł –Ī—č–Ľ –≤—č–ī–į—é—Č–ł–ľ—Ā—Ź —É—á—Ď–Ĺ—č–ľ, –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–Ļ –ĺ—Ā—ā–į–≤–ł–Ľ –Ņ–ĺ—Ā–Ľ–Ķ —Ā–Ķ–Ī—Ź –Ĺ–į—É—á–Ĺ–ĺ–Ķ –ĺ—ā–ļ—Ä—č—ā–ł–Ķ –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–ľ—É –Ĺ–Ķ—ā —Ü–Ķ–Ĺ—č. –í—Ā—Ź –ī–ł–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–ľ–į –≤ —ā–ĺ–ľ, —á—ā–ĺ –ł–ľ –Ĺ–Ķ –Ĺ—É–∂–Ĺ–į —Ā–į–ľ–į –ī–Ķ–≤—É—ą–ļ–į, –ł–ľ –Ĺ—É–∂–Ĺ–ĺ —ć—ā–ĺ –ĺ—ā–ļ—Ä—č—ā–ł–Ķ. –†–ł—Ā–ļ—É—Ź —Ā–≤–ĺ–Ķ–Ļ –∂–ł–∑–Ĺ—Ć—é –ī–Ķ–≤—É—ą–ļ–į –≤–ł–ī–ł—ā –ĺ–ī–ł–Ĺ –≤—č—Ö–ĺ–ī –ł–∑ —Ā–ł—ā—É–į—Ü–ł–ł-—ć—ā–ĺ –Ņ–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–ī–į—ā—Ć –≤—Ā—Ď –∑–į–Ņ–ł—Ā–ł –ĺ—ā—Ü–į –Ķ–≥–ĺ —É—á–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–ļ—É, –ļ–ĺ—ā–ĺ—Ä—č–Ļ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–∂–ł–≤–į–Ķ—ā –≤ –ü–ĺ–Ľ—Ć—ą–Ķ. –ě–Ĺ–į –Ņ–ĺ–Ĺ–ł–ľ–į–Ķ—ā —á—ā–ĺ —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ–Ľ–Ķ—ā –ł –Ņ–ĺ–Ķ–∑–ī –ī–Ľ—Ź –Ņ–ĺ–Ķ–∑–ī–ļ–ł –Ĺ–Ķ–≤–ĺ–∑–ľ–ĺ–∂–Ĺ—č, —ā–į–ļ –ļ–į–ļ –Ķ–Ķ –Ľ–Ķ–≥–ļ–ĺ –ľ–ĺ–≥—É—ā –Ĺ–į–Ļ—ā–ł. –í–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–Ĺ–ł–ļ–į –∑–Ĺ–į–ļ–ĺ–ľ–ł—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź —Ā –ī–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–Ī–ĺ–Ļ—Č–ł–ļ–ĺ–ľ, –≤–ĺ–∑—Ź—Č–Ķ–≥–ĺ —á–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–∑ –≥—Ä–į–Ĺ–ł—Ü—É –ľ–Ķ–Ī–Ķ–Ľ—Ć –ł —É–Ķ–∑–∂–į–Ķ—ā –≤ –ö—Ä–į–ļ–ĺ–≤ —Ā –Ĺ–ł–ľ –≤ –Ķ–≥–ĺ —Ą—É—Ä–≥–ĺ–Ĺ–Ķ. –ě–ī–Ĺ–į–ļ–ĺ –Ĺ–Ķ–≤–ĺ–∑–ľ–ĺ–∂–Ĺ–ĺ –≤—Ā—Ď –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ā—á–ł—ā–į—ā—Ć —Ą–ĺ—Ä—ā—É–Ĺ–į –Ĺ–į–Ņ—Ä–ĺ—á—Ć –ĺ—ā–≤–Ķ—Ä–Ĺ—É–Ľ–į—Ā—Ć. –Ě–Ķ–Ņ—Ä–Ķ–ī–≤–ł–ī–Ķ–Ĺ–Ĺ—č–Ļ —Ā–Ľ—É—á–į–Ļ –∑–į—Ā—ā–į–≤–Ľ—Ź–Ķ—ā –ī–Ķ–≤—É—ą–ļ—É –ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—Ź—ā—Ć —Ā–≤–ĺ—é —Ü–Ķ–Ľ—Ć –ł —ā–Ķ–Ņ–Ķ—Ä—Ć —É–∂–Ķ —Ā–Ņ–į—Ā–į—ā—Ć —Ā–≤–ĺ—é –∂–ł–∑–Ĺ—Ć –Ĺ–ĺ —Ā–į–ľ–ĺ–Ķ –ĺ–Ī–ł–ī–Ĺ–ĺ–Ķ, —á—ā–ĺ –Ī—č–Ľ –Ņ–ĺ—Ö–ł—Č–Ķ–Ĺ –Ī–Ľ–ĺ–ļ–Ĺ–ĺ—ā –ĺ—ā—Ü–į —Ā–ĺ –≤—Ā–Ķ–ľ–ł –∑–į–Ņ–ł—Ā—Ź–ľ–ł. –Ě–į—Ā–ļ–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–ļ–ĺ —Ö–≤–į—ā–ł—ā —É –í–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ł —Ā–ł–Ľ –ł –ľ—É–∂–Ķ—Ā—ā–≤–į –Ĺ–į–Ļ—ā–ł –≤–Ķ—Ä–Ĺ—č–Ļ –Ņ—É—ā—Ć –ł –Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ł–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–Ķ —Ä–Ķ—ą–Ķ–Ĺ–ł–Ķ.

–§–ł–Ľ—Ć–ľ –ĺ—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ–≤–į–Ĺ –Ĺ–į —Ä–Ķ–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ—č—Ö —Ā–ĺ–Ī—č—ā–ł—Ź—Ö –ł —Ä–į—Ā—Ā–ļ–į–∑—č–≤–į–Ķ—ā –ĺ –∑–Ĺ–į–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ–ł—ā–ĺ–ľ –į–Ĺ–≥–Ľ–ł–Ļ—Ā–ļ–ĺ–ľ –ĺ—ā—Ä—Ź–ī–Ķ ¬ę30 Assault Unit¬Ľ, –ł–∑–≤–Ķ—Ā—ā–Ĺ–ĺ–ľ —ā–į–ļ–∂–Ķ –Ņ–ĺ–ī –Ĺ–į–∑–≤–į–Ĺ–ł–Ķ–ľ ¬ę30 Commando¬Ľ. –ě—ā—Ä—Ź–ī –Ī—č–Ľ —Ā—Ą–ĺ—Ä–ľ–ł—Ä–ĺ–≤–į–Ĺ –≤–ĺ –≤—Ä–Ķ–ľ—Ź –í—ā–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–Ļ –ľ–ł—Ä–ĺ–≤–ĺ–Ļ –Ņ–ĺ –ł–Ĺ–ł—Ü–ł–į—ā–ł–≤–Ķ –Į–Ĺ–į –§–Ľ–Ķ–ľ–ł–Ĺ–≥–į, —Ā–Ľ—É–∂–ł–≤—ą–Ķ–≥–ĺ —ā–ĺ–≥–ī–į –≤ –Ī—Ä–ł—ā–į–Ĺ—Ā–ļ–ĺ–Ļ –≤–ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ-–ľ–ĺ—Ä—Ā–ļ–ĺ–Ļ —Ä–į–∑–≤–Ķ–ī–ļ–Ķ, –ł –ī–Ķ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤–ĺ–≤–į–Ľ –Ĺ–į –ĺ–ļ–ļ—É–Ņ–ł—Ä–ĺ–≤–į–Ĺ–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –Ĺ–į—Ü–ł—Ā—ā–į–ľ–ł —ā–Ķ—Ä—Ä–ł—ā–ĺ—Ä–ł–ł. –ē–≥–ĺ –∑–į–ī–į—á–Ķ–Ļ –Ī—č–Ľ–į –ī–ĺ–Ī—č—á–į –Ĺ–Ķ–ľ–Ķ—Ü–ļ–ĺ–Ļ —Ā–Ķ–ļ—Ä–Ķ—ā–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –ī–ĺ–ļ—É–ľ–Ķ–Ĺ—ā–į—Ü–ł–ł –ł —Ä–į–∑–Ľ–ł—á–Ĺ—č—Ö —ā–Ķ—Ö–Ĺ–ł—á–Ķ—Ā–ļ–ł—Ö —É—Ā—ā—Ä–ĺ–Ļ—Ā—ā–≤.

MaraŇülńĪ ve Mahur uzun zaman sonra ilk kez bir araya gelir. AralarńĪnda yaŇüanan hesaplaŇümada, MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn bunca zamandńĪr nerede olduńüunu soran Mahur, MaraŇülńĪ‚ÄônńĪn elini kana bulamasńĪndan rahatsńĪz olur. MaraŇülńĪ, Mahur‚Äôun baŇüńĪna gelebilecek tehlikeye karŇüńĪ sergiye gider. ńįlhan‚ÄôńĪn peŇüinde olan Behram, ńįlhan‚Äôa iki saat i√ßinde teslim olmaz ise Mahur‚Äôu ve t√ľm sergidekileri √∂ld√ľr√ľleceńüini s√∂yler. MaraŇülńĪ sergidekileri koruma altńĪna alńĪrken Nevzat bombayńĪ uzaktan patlatacak kiŇüinin peŇüine d√ľŇüer. OlaylarńĪn kontrolden √ßńĪkmasńĪyla g√∂zler MaraŇülńĪ‚Äôya √ßevrilir. ŠÉēŠÉėŠÉďŠÉĒŠÉĚ ŠÉ¨ŠÉźŠÉ†ŠÉõŠÉĚŠÉźŠÉďŠÉíŠÉĒŠÉúŠÉ° ŠÉ°ŠÉźŠÉĖŠÉĚŠÉíŠÉźŠÉďŠÉĚŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉ†ŠÉėŠÉēŠÉė ŠÉõŠÉźŠÉ£ŠÉ¨ŠÉßŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉöŠÉėŠÉ° ŠÉ°ŠÉźŠÉôŠÉ£ŠÉóŠÉ†ŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉźŠÉ°.

ŠÉďŠÉźŠÉ£ŠÉ®ŠÉēŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉĒŠÉöŠÉėŠÉź ŠÉõŠÉźŠÉ°ŠÉźŠÉöŠÉėŠÉ° ŠÉ©ŠÉźŠÉõŠÉĚŠÉĘŠÉēŠÉėŠÉ†ŠÉóŠÉēŠÉź ŠÉďŠÉź ŠÉ°ŠÉģŠÉēŠÉźŠÉíŠÉźŠÉú ŠÉźŠÉĘŠÉēŠÉėŠÉ†ŠÉóŠÉēŠÉź,
ŠÉźŠÉõ ŠÉ®ŠÉĒŠÉõŠÉóŠÉģŠÉēŠÉĒŠÉēŠÉźŠÉ®ŠÉė ŠÉõŠÉźŠÉ£ŠÉ¨ŠÉßŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉĒŠÉöŠÉė ŠÉ£ŠÉ§ŠÉöŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉźŠÉ° ŠÉėŠÉĘŠÉĚŠÉēŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉ° ŠÉõŠÉėŠÉõŠÉźŠÉ†ŠÉóŠÉĚŠÉ° ŠÉ®ŠÉĒŠÉ°ŠÉźŠÉĎŠÉźŠÉõŠÉėŠÉ° ŠÉĖŠÉĚŠÉõŠÉĒŠÉĎŠÉ°.

snippet.description:
‘Ī’Ą’Ü-’ę ’∂’°’≠’°’£’°’į ’č’ł ‘≤’°’Ķ’§’•’∂’ę ’Į’ł’≤’ī’ę÷Ā ’Ä’°’Ķ’ł÷Ā ÷Ā’•’≤’°’Ĺ’ļ’°’∂’ł÷ā’©’Ķ’°’∂ ’≥’°’∂’°’Ļ’ł÷ā’ī’® ’Ļ’ę ’Į’°÷Ä’ł’≤ ’°’ī’ł÷Ą’•’¨ ’į’°’Ķ ’™’ł’≤’ł’ĺ÷Ä’§’ę ’ĺ’•÷Ä÷Ą’®. ’§’° ’Į’°÷Ä’ł’≤ ’ß ’°’∂’•’¨ ’ī’ę’°’Ķ’∂ ‘Ļ’ł÷ā÷Ä÷Ą’ę’°’Ķ’ę ’≠’ł÷Ä’į÷Ä’§’°÷Ä’°’∂’®‚Ä§ ’ć’ę’ĺ’ę’¨’Ü’•’©’ę ‘≥’•’ł÷Ä’£’ę ’Ą’ę÷Ä’¶’°’Ę’•’Į’Ķ’°’∂’ę ’į’•’Ņ ’¶÷Ä’ł÷ā’Ķ÷Ā’ł÷ā’ī ’∂’∑’ł÷ā’ī ’ß ‘Ļ’ł÷ā÷Ä÷Ą’ę’°’Ķ’ę ’≠’ł÷Ä’į÷Ä’§’°÷Ä’°’∂’ę ’ļ’°’Ņ’£’°’ī’°’ĺ’ł÷Ä ‘Ņ’°÷Ä’ł ’ď’°’Ķ’¨’°’∂’®: ’Ü÷Ä’° ’į’°’ī’ł’¶’ī’°’ī’Ę’Ě ’°÷Ä’§’°÷Ä’°÷Ä’ł÷ā’©’Ķ’ł÷ā’∂’® ’ļ’•’Ņ÷Ą ’ß ’ĺ’•÷Ä’°’Į’°’∂’£’∂’ĺ’ę ’°’Ķ’∂’Ņ’•’≤, ’ł÷Ä’Ņ’•’≤ ’°’Ķ’§ ’ł’≥÷Ä’°’£’ł÷Ä’ģ’ł÷ā’©’Ķ’ł÷ā’∂’® ’Į’°’Ņ’°÷Ä’ĺ’•’¨ ’ß÷Č ’ď’°’Ķ’¨’°’∂’∂ ’®’∂’§’£’ģ’ł÷ā’ī ’ß ‘Ļ’ł÷ā÷Ä÷Ą’ę’°’Ķ’ę ’™’ł’≤’ł’ĺ÷Ä’§’°’ĺ’°÷Ä’°÷Ā’ī’°’∂ ’Į’°÷Ä÷á’ł÷Ä’ł÷ā’©’Ķ’ł÷ā’∂’®’Ě ’ī’ę ’Ę’°’∂, ’ł÷Ä’ę ’į’°’ī’°÷Ä ’∂’° ’ļ’°’Ķ÷Ą’°÷Ä’ł÷ā’ī ’ß:

–†–ĺ—Ā—Ė—Ź: —Ā—Ć–ĺ–≥–ĺ–ī–Ĺ—Ė –≤—Ė–ī–Ī—É–Ľ–ł—Ā—Ź –ľ–į—Ā–ĺ–≤—Ė –ľ—Ė—ā–ł–Ĺ–≥–ł —Ė –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—ā–Ķ—Ā—ā–ł –Ĺ–į –Ņ—Ė–ī—ā—Ä–ł–ľ–ļ—É —É–≤'—Ź–∑–Ĺ–Ķ–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ĺ–Ņ–ĺ–∑–ł—Ü—Ė–ĺ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ä–į –ě–Ľ–Ķ–ļ—Ā—Ė—Ź –Ě–į–≤–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ, —Ź–ļ–ł–Ļ –∑ –ļ—Ė–Ĺ—Ü—Ź –Ī–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–∑–Ĺ—Ź —ā—Ä–ł–ľ–į—Ē –≥–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–ī—É–≤–į–Ĺ–Ĺ—Ź –≤ –ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–Ĺ—Ė—ó —É –í–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–ī–ł–ľ–ł—Ä—Ā—Ć–ļ—Ė–Ļ –ĺ–Ī–Ľ–į—Ā—ā—Ė. –ü–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–ī –Ņ–ĺ—á–į—ā–ļ–ĺ–ľ –ľ—Ė—ā–ł–Ĺ–≥—Ė–≤ –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—Ė—Ü—Ė—Ź –∑–į—ā—Ä–ł–ľ—É–≤–į–Ľ–į —Ė –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–≤–ĺ–ī–ł–Ľ–į –ĺ–Ī—ą—É–ļ–ł –≤ –į–ļ—ā–ł–≤—Ė—Ā—ā—Ė–≤ —Ė –∂—É—Ä–Ĺ–į–Ľ—Ė—Ā—ā—Ė–≤.

–£ –ī–Ķ—Ź–ļ–ł—Ö –ľ—Ė—Ā—ā–į—Ö –≤–Ľ–į–ī–į –ĺ–Ī–ľ–Ķ–∂–ł–Ľ–į –ī–ĺ—Ā—ā—É–Ņ –ī–ĺ —Ü–Ķ–Ĺ—ā—Ä–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ł—Ö –Ņ–Ľ–ĺ—Č, –ī–Ķ –Ņ—Ä–ł—Ö–ł–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ł –ĺ–Ņ–ĺ–∑–ł—Ü—Ė–ĺ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ä–į –∑–Ī–ł—Ä–į–Ľ–ł—Ā—Ź –Ņ—Ä–ĺ–≤–ĺ–ī–ł—ā–ł –ľ—Ė—ā–ł–Ĺ–≥–ł. –ó–į –ĺ—Ā—ā–į–Ĺ–Ĺ—Ė–ľ–ł –ī–į–Ĺ–ł–ľ–ł –Ņ—Ä–į–≤–ĺ–∑–į—Ö–ł—Ā–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—Ē–ļ—ā—É ¬ę–ě–í–Ē-–ł–Ĺ—Ą–ĺ¬Ľ, —É —Ü—Ė–Ľ–ĺ–ľ—É –≤ –†–ĺ—Ā—Ė—ó –∑–į—ā—Ä–ł–ľ–į–Ĺ—Ė 325 –Ľ—é–ī–Ķ–Ļ —É –Ī—Ė–Ľ—Ć—ą —Ź–ļ 40 –ľ—Ė—Ā—ā–į—Ö –ļ—Ä–į—ó–Ĺ–ł. –Ě–į–Ļ–Ī—Ė–Ľ—Ć—ą–Ķ –∑–į—ā—Ä–ł–ľ–į–Ĺ–ł—Ö –≤ –£—Ą—Ė ‚Äď 40, –ö–Ķ–ľ–Ķ—Ä–ĺ–≤—Ė ‚Äď 36, –Ď–į—Ä–Ĺ–į—É–Ľ—Ė ‚Äď 33, –Ě–ĺ–≤–ĺ–ļ—É–∑–Ĺ–Ķ—Ü—Ć–ļ—É ‚Äď 30.

–ü—Ä–ł—Ö–ł–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ł–ļ–ł –Ě–į–≤–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ĺ–≥–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ—Ā–ł–Ľ–ł –∑–į–≥–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ĺ—Ä–ĺ—Ā—Ė–Ļ—Ā—Ć–ļ—É –į–ļ—Ü—Ė—é –Ĺ–į –Ņ—Ė–ī—ā—Ä–ł–ľ–ļ—É –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—Ė—ā–ł–ļ–į, —Ź–ļ–ł–Ļ –∑ 31 –Ī–Ķ—Ä–Ķ–∑–Ĺ—Ź —ā—Ä–ł–ľ–į—Ē –≥–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–ī—É–≤–į–Ĺ–Ĺ—Ź –≤ –ļ–ĺ–Ľ–ĺ–Ĺ—Ė—ó. –Ě–į–≤–į–Ľ—Ć–Ĺ–ł–Ļ –ī–ĺ–ľ–į–≥–į—Ē—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź, —Č–ĺ–Ī –ī–ĺ –Ĺ—Ć–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ī–ĺ–Ņ—É—Ā—ā–ł–Ľ–ł –Ĺ–Ķ–∑–į–Ľ–Ķ–∂–Ĺ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –Ľ—Ė–ļ–į—Ä—Ź. –†–į–Ĺ—Ė—ą–Ķ –Ļ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –Ľ—Ė–ļ–į—Ä—Ė –∑–į—Ź–≤–ł–Ľ–ł, —Č–ĺ —Ā—ā–į–Ĺ –∑–ī–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–≤‚Äô—Ź –ĺ–Ņ–ĺ–∑–ł—Ü—Ė–ĺ–Ĺ–Ķ—Ä–į —ą–≤–ł–ī–ļ–ĺ –Ņ–ĺ–≥—Ė—Ä—ą—É—Ē—ā—Ć—Ā—Ź.

Bao is a 2018 American computer-animated short film written and directed by Domee Shi and produced by Pixar Animation Studios. It was released with Incredibles 2 on June 15, 2018. The film is about an aging and lonely Chinese-Canadian mother, suffering from empty nest syndrome, who receives an unexpected second chance at motherhood when she makes a steamed bun (baozi) that comes to life. The film won the Oscar for the Best Animated Short Film at the 91st Academy Awards.

A Chinese-Canadian woman suffering from empty nest syndrome gets a second shot at motherhood when one of her handmade dumplings comes alive.

¬© 2018 The Walt Disney Company. | All Rights Reserved.

snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click¬†https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwow¬†and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

We know you bimmer boys have been waiting for this one‚Ä¶ a proper BMW M4 showdown!! 

Mat‚Äôs in the new M4 ‚ÄėLite‚Äô, the M440i, and he‚Äôs going up against both the new & old BMW M4! The question is, does the all-new wide-grilled M4 have what it takes to snatch the win over the competition?

Well when you look at the stats on paper you‚Äôd think it‚Äôll be in for an easy win! With a 3-litre straight-six twin-turbo under the bonnet, it can put down a mighty 510hp & 650Nm of torque. As for the old M4, you‚Äôll find the same size engine up front, although it can 'only' produce 450hp & 550Nm. 

Then we have the M440i, which may also being powered by a 3-litre straight-six, although it only has a single turbo. As a result, it can produce 374hp & 500Nm of torque. Its weight is almost identical to that of the new M4, although the older model comes in about 150kg less than them both.

However, the M440i has one key advantage compared to the M4s - it‚Äôs AWD! Will it make the difference? There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: Yemin 330. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | The Promise Season 3 Episode 330 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

UyanńĪŇü: B√ľy√ľk Sel√ßuklu 28. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet:

Hasan Sabbah ve BatńĪniler, BaŇüulu‚Äôyu tuzańüa d√ľŇü√ľr√ľp onu ka√ßńĪrmńĪŇülar, √∂te yandan b√ľy√ľk bir kumpas kurup Ňěelemzar‚ÄôńĪ ele ge√ßirmeyi baŇüarmńĪŇülardńĪ. Dińüer taraftan Sencer, BaŇüulu‚Äônun ka√ßńĪrńĪldńĪńüńĪnńĪ ve Livya‚ÄônńĪn yaralanmasńĪna sebep olan kiŇüinin Efruz olduńüunu ve Efruz‚Äôun Sabbah‚Äôa √ßalńĪŇüan kńĪdemli bir BatńĪni olduńüunu √∂ńürenmiŇüti. BaŇüulu‚Äôyu BatńĪnilerin ka√ßńĪrdńĪńüńĪnńĪ anlayan Sencer, Efruz‚Äôu yakalamak i√ßin Ňěelemzar Dar√ľŇüŇüifasńĪ‚Äėna dońüru yola koyulmuŇütu.
BaŇüulu‚Äônun Sabbah‚ÄôńĪn elinde olduńüunu √∂ńürendiklerinde Ňěelemzar‚ÄôńĪ alamayacaklarńĪnńĪ anlayńĪp Sabbah‚ÄôńĪn BaŇüulu‚Äôyu serbest bńĪrakmak i√ßin istedińüi Nizar‚ÄôńĪn Hilati‚Äôni getirmeyi kabul etmek zorunda kalmńĪŇülar ve MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn huzuruna √ßńĪkńĪp bir bahaneyle Nizar‚ÄôńĪn Hilati‚Äôni istemiŇülerdi.
MelikŇüah, kńĪsa bir s√ľre sonra Sencerlerin gizli y√ľr√ľtt√ľkleri bu harek√ĘtńĪ √∂ńürenmiŇü ve Nizar‚ÄôńĪn Hilati‚Äôni vererek; Sencerlerden gizli olarak Sabbah‚Äôa bir tuzak kurmuŇü ve sńĪrrńĪn aŇüik√Ęr olma vetiresini bu Ňüekilde baŇülatmńĪŇütńĪ.
MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn kurduńüu tuzańüńĪn neticesinde Sabbah hem hilatten hem de BaŇüulu‚Äôdan olmuŇütu. √á√ľnk√ľ MelikŇüah, BaŇüulu‚Äôyu Ňěelemzar‚Äôdan ka√ßńĪrtmayńĪ baŇüarmńĪŇütńĪ. Sencer, Nizam√ľlm√ľlk, Tapar ve MelikŇüah saraya d√∂nm√ľŇülerdi.
BaŇüulu, MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn karŇüńĪsńĪna gelmiŇüti. BaŇüulu mecbur kalńĪp y√ľz√ľndeki pe√ßeyi indirince uzun yńĪllar sonra ilk kez BaŇüulu ve MelikŇüah, birbirlerinin y√ľz√ľn√ľ g√∂rm√ľŇüler ve sńĪr a√ßńĪlmńĪŇütńĪ! YńĪllar √∂nce bu sńĪrrńĪ tertipleyen ve MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn tahta √ßńĪkmasńĪnńĪ sańülayan Nizam√ľlm√ľlk, sultana yalan s√∂yledińüi i√ßin nasńĪl bir h√ľk√ľmle karŇüńĪlaŇüacaktńĪr?
MelikŇüah, yanńĪna kadar y√ľkselip yine de kendisinden saklanan Sencer‚Äôi ve MelikŇüah‚ÄôńĪn kendisini √∂ld√ľ bilmesine tahamm√ľl edip saklanmayńĪ s√ľrd√ľren BaŇüulu‚Äôyu affedecek midir?
√Ėte yandan sńĪrrńĪn a√ßńĪlmasńĪ √ßok hńĪzlńĪ bir Ňüekilde t√ľm Sel√ßuklu hanedanńĪna yayńĪlacaktńĪr. Sel√ßuklu HanedanńĪ √ľyeleri BaŇüulu‚Äônun yaŇüadńĪńüńĪ ve Sencer‚Äôin gizli bir veliaht olarak ortaya √ßńĪkmasńĪnńĪ nasńĪl karŇüńĪlayacaktńĪr?
SńĪrrńĪ MelikŇüah‚Äôtan daha √∂nce √∂ńürenen ve sńĪrrńĪn a√ßńĪlmamasńĪ i√ßin BaŇüulu‚Äônun kurtarńĪlmasńĪna mani olmak isteyen ve baŇüarńĪlńĪ olamayan Terken‚Äôin BaŇüulu‚Äôya karŇüńĪ d√ľŇümanca tavrńĪ eyleme d√∂n√ľŇüecek midir?

snippet.title: Yemin 331. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | The Promise Season 3 Episode 331 Promo
snippet.description:
Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.description:

AmcasńĪ HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äôyi korumak i√ßin iyileŇütińüini saklayan Alpaslan √áakńĪrbeyli, ńįlhan‚ÄôńĪn infazńĪna imzasńĪnńĪ atar. ńįki kez g√∂ńüse bir kez kafaya sńĪktńĪńüńĪ kurŇüun y√ľz√ľnden t√ľm Ňü√ľpheleri √ľzerine √ßeken Alpaslan √áakńĪrbeyli, amcasńĪnńĪn t√ľm sńĪkńĪŇütńĪrmalarńĪna rańümen a√ßńĪk vermez. 
 
HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli, Yavuz SincanlńĪ‚ÄônńĪn verdińüi listenin peŇüinden iz s√ľrmeye devam eder. Tek tek t√ľm isimlerin √ľzerine gitmeye kararlńĪ olan HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äônin yanńĪnda ailesi ve dostlarńĪ yer alńĪr. HńĪzńĪr √áakńĪrbeyli ve dostlarńĪnńĪn koruyuculuńüunu ise kanuni AsńĪm √ľstlenir. 
 
Abisinin verdińüi savaŇüta en √∂n safta yer alan ńįlyas √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äôyi ise eŇüi √Ėm√ľr √áakńĪrbeyli sńĪkńĪŇütńĪrńĪr. ńįlyas‚ÄôńĪn hayatńĪndan endiŇüe eden √Ėm√ľr √áakńĪrbeyli‚Äônin aldńĪńüńĪ tavńĪr y√ľz√ľnden PńĪnar‚Äôa g√ľn dońüar.

snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

Camdaki KńĪz 1. B√∂l√ľm 

8 Nisan PerŇüembe

T√ľrkiye'nin en b√ľy√ľk oteller zinciri olan Korońülu'nun Ňüirketinde mimar olarak √ßalńĪŇüan Nalan, yumuŇüak huylu, zeki, sńĪcakkanlńĪ ve d√ľnyalar g√ľzeli bir gen√ß kadńĪndńĪr. Ailesinin tek √ßocuńüudur. HayatńĪnńĪ varlńĪk, ilgi, alaka i√ßinde ge√ßirmiŇü, en iyi okullardan dereceyle mezun olmuŇü olan Nalan'ńĪn, herkesten sakladńĪńüńĪ bir sńĪrrńĪ vardńĪr...

Dińüer yandan Nalan'ńĪn √ßalńĪŇütńĪńüńĪ Ňüirketin gen√ß veliahtńĪ Sedat, kendisinden yaŇü√ßa b√ľy√ľk ve evli bir kadńĪn olan, sosyetik g√ľzel Cana ile uzun yńĪllardńĪr yasak bir iliŇüki yaŇüamaktadńĪr. Ňěirketin sahibi ve Sedat'ńĪn babasńĪ olan Rafet Korońülu, yńĪllarca didinip kurduńüu Korońülu imparatorluńüunun itibarńĪnńĪn, ŇüńĪmarńĪk ońülu Sedat tarafńĪndan lekelenmesine izin vermeyecektir. Rafet, Sedat'ńĪ Cana'dan ayńĪrmak i√ßin, onu zorla baŇüka biriyle evlendirmeye karar verir.

Ve kader √ßarkńĪ d√∂ner... Sedat ile Nalan'ńĪn yollarńĪ kesiŇüir. HayatńĪ boyunca kendisini babasńĪna ispatlayamamńĪŇü olan Sedat'ńĪn tek √ßaresi, daha √∂nce hi√ß tanńĪmadńĪńüńĪ Nalan'la evlenmektir. Peki Sedat, Nalan'ńĪn hayallerindeki "kurtarńĪcńĪ prens" midir? 

√áocukluklarńĪndan yaralńĪ olan bu ikili kavuŇüup masallardaki gibi bir aŇük yaŇüayabilecek midir? Yoksa onlarńĪ bug√ľne kadar hi√ß hayal etmedikleri bir karanlńĪk mńĪ beklemektedir?

G√ľlseren BudayńĪcńĪońülu‚Äônun aynńĪ isimli romanńĪndan uyarlanan, ger√ßek bir aŇük hikayesinin konu alńĪndńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz, baŇüarńĪlńĪ oyuncu kadrosuyla da g√∂z dolduruyor. Nalan karakterini Burcu Biricik‚Äôin canlandńĪrdńĪńüńĪ Camdaki KńĪz‚Äôda; Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu G√ľler, Feyyaz Ňěerifońülu, Hamza YazńĪcńĪ, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur S√ľrer, Selma Erge√ß,  Ňěerif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tuńürul T√ľlek yer alńĪyor. Senaryosunu Seda AltaylńĪ Turgutlu‚Äônun kaleme aldńĪńüńĪ, y√∂netmenlińüini ise Nadim G√ľ√ß'√ľn √ľstlendińüi Camdaki KńĪz PerŇüembe 20.00'de Kanal D'de!

------------------

Burcu Biricik is going to portray the character Nalan, and the other successful actors and actresses of the series are Devrim Yakut, Feri Baycu Guler, Feyyaz Serifoglu, Hamza Yazici, Hande Ataizi, Merve Polat, Nihal Menzil, Nur Surer, Selma Ergec, Serif Erol, Tamer Levent, Tugrul Tulek. snippet.title: Emanet 165. B√∂l√ľm | Legacy Episode 165
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet
#ńįyiOlacańüńĪz
#SehYam

–ú–į—Ä–ł—Ź —É–Ķ–∑–∂–į–Ķ—ā –≤ —Ä–ĺ–ī–Ĺ–ĺ–Ļ –≥–ĺ—Ä–ĺ–ī, –≥–ī–Ķ —Ā–Ĺ–ĺ–≤–į –≤—Ā—ā—Ä–Ķ—á–į–Ķ—ā –≤—č—ą–Ķ–ī—ą–Ķ–≥–ĺ –ł–∑ —ā—é—Ä—Ć–ľ—č –ź–Ľ–Ķ–ļ—Ā–Ķ—Ź. –ě–Ĺ–ł –≤–ĺ–∑–≤—Ä–į—Č–į—é—ā—Ā—Ź –ļ –Ņ—Ä–Ķ–∂–Ĺ–Ķ–Ļ –∂–ł–∑–Ĺ–ł, –Ņ—č—ā–į—Ź—Ā—Ć –∑–į–Ľ–Ķ—á–ł—ā—Ć —Ä–į–Ĺ—č. –ė —ā–ĺ–Ľ—Ć–ļ–ĺ —Ā–Ņ—É—Ā—ā—Ź –≥–ĺ–ī—č –ú–į—Ä–ł—Ź –Ņ–ĺ–Ľ—É—á–į–Ķ—ā —ą–į–Ĺ—Ā —Ä–į—Ā–ļ—Ä—č—ā—Ć —ā–į–Ļ–Ĺ—č —Ā–≤–ĺ–Ķ–≥–ĺ –Ņ—Ä–ĺ—ą–Ľ–ĺ–≥–ĺ –ł —Ä–į–∑—č—Ā–ļ–į—ā—Ć –ī–ĺ—á—Ć‚Ä¶

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

49. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzet

Sancar, kocaman bir aile olacak olmanńĪn mutluluńüunu yaŇüar. Mavi ve Melek i√ßin Mavi‚Äônin √ßabalarńĪ sayesinde konańüńĪn kapńĪlarńĪ tekrar a√ßńĪlńĪr. Ancak Halise‚Äônin nasńĪr tutan kalbinin kapńĪlarńĪnńĪn a√ßńĪlmaya hi√ß niyeti yoktur.

Halise ise vicdanńĪyla evladńĪnńĪ kaybetme ihtimali arasńĪnda kalńĪr. Elvan √∂ńürendiklerini sindirmeye √ßalńĪŇüńĪrken arka arkaya t√ľm hayatńĪnńĪ deńüiŇütirecek kararlar vermek zorunda kalńĪr. AklńĪ ve kalbi arasńĪnda gelgitler yaŇüarken Bora ve Yahya‚ÄônńĪn hamleleriyle iyice k√∂Ňüeye sńĪkńĪŇüacaktńĪr. 

Sancar kalbindeki kuŇükulardan arńĪnńĪp t√ľm ailesine sahip √ßńĪkmaya √ßalńĪŇüńĪrken yine Mavi‚Äônin tek baŇüńĪna alacańüńĪ bir kararla sńĪnanacaktńĪr. √ústelik bu karar yalnńĪzca ikisini deńüil Sancar‚ÄôńĪn sevdińüi baŇüka hayatlarńĪ da etkilemektedir.

Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.
